name: Cyber Check Multiservices
description_short: Cyber Check Multiservices is a Columbus-based check-cashing and money transfer provider with 6 locations offering international wire transfers, bill payments, and business services.
description_long:
Cyber Check Multiservices operates as a multiservice financial center in Columbus, Ohio, with over 15 years of experience serving the local community, particularly Spanish-speaking customers. The company maintains 6 physical locations across Columbus and positions itself as a one-stop shop for unbanked and underbanked consumers seeking alternatives to traditional banks.

The company's core offerings include check cashing (payroll, government, tax refunds, personal checks), international money transfers through partnerships with MoneyGram, Ria, Intercambio, Sigue, Barri, Intermex, and ViaAmerica, and money order services. Beyond basic financial services, Cyber Check also provides notary services, ITIN number applications, tax preparation, LLC formation and business registration with Ohio, vehicle title and plate processing, utility bill payments (same-day for electricity and gas), cell phone recharges, and airline ticket booking. Their website advertises competitive exchange rates for transfers to Mexico, Guatemala, Honduras, and Colombia.

Cyber Check distinguishes itself through extensive service bundling—combining check-cashing with remittance services, business formation, and government document processing under one roof. The company emphasizes bilingual service (Spanish/English), extended hours (9 a.m.–9 p.m. Monday–Saturday, 9 a.m.–6 p.m. Sunday), multiple location convenience, and customer testimonials claiming a 5/5 rating. They also operate a notary public at their central office during business hours.

As a check-cashing service, Cyber Check fills a legitimate niche for consumers without bank accounts, but customers should note that specific fee structures, exchange rate markups, and APRs are not disclosed on the website. The breadth of services suggests they operate primarily as a cash-based service center rather than offering credit products, making them suitable for transaction processing rather than credit building or debt management.
pros: 6 convenient Columbus locations with extended hours (9 a.m.–9 p.m. most days)
Partnerships with 7 major international money transfer providers (MoneyGram, Ria, Intercambio, Intermex, ViaAmerica, Sigue, Barri)
Cashes all check types including payroll, government, tax refunds, and personal checks
Same-day utility bill payment (electricity and gas) and 24-hour guaranteed payment for other services
In-house notary public available during business hours at central location
Bilingual customer service in Spanish and English across all locations
Over 15 years of operating history in the Columbus market
One-stop multiservice hub combining check-cashing, tax prep, business formation, and bill payments
cons: No fee structure, exchange rate margins, or pricing transparency disclosed on website
No information about minimum or maximum check-cashing amounts or eligibility requirements
No online account opening, digital banking, or mobile app—cash/in-person only
Limited geographic footprint (Columbus area only, no nationwide service)
No credit-building products or benefits—purely transactional services with no account history reporting
best_for: Spanish-speaking immigrants and international workers sending money to Mexico, Central America, or Colombia
Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check-cashing without a bank account
Small business owners in Columbus needing LLC formation, notary services, and bill payment in one location
Consumers seeking same-day utility bill payments and government document processing
diagnosis: Cyber Check is best for Spanish-speaking Columbus residents and immigrants needing check-cashing, international money transfers, and bundled financial services without a traditional bank account. The main caveat is the lack of fee transparency and pricing information on their website—customers must visit in person or call to understand the true cost of services.
services: Check cashing (payroll, government, tax refunds, personal checks)
International money transfers (MoneyGram, Ria, Intercambio, Intermex, ViaAmerica, Sigue, Barri)
Utility bill payments (same-day for electricity/gas, 24-hour guarantee for others)
LLC creation and business registration in Ohio
Vehicle title and license plate/sticker processing for Ohio
Cell phone recharges to international destinations
